name: kleoth
title: Kleoth
description: Control the Kleoth meeting recorder and browse your transcribed meetings — local-first, bot-free.
author: shck

commands.name: toggle-recording
commands.title: Toggle Recording
commands.description: Start the recording if idle, stop & transcribe if recording.

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start recording the current meeting (mic + system audio).

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop & Transcribe
commands.description: Stop the recording and transcribe it on-device.

commands.name: meetings
commands.title: Search Meetings
commands.description: Browse, open, and copy your recorded meetings.

commands.name: latest-summary
commands.title: Latest Summary
commands.description: Read the most recent meeting's summary.
